passage.html:
Reading Practice Test 02

IELTS Reading Practice Exercise

You should spend about 20 minutes on Questions 1-5 which are based on Reading Passage 1 below.

From Physics to History: The Origins of Humankind

About 13.5 billion years ago, matter, energy, time and space came into being in what is known as the Big Bang...

questions.html:
Questions 1-5

Do the following statements agree with the information given in Reading Passage 1?

1. IELTS Online Tests is the number one IELTS study platform.

  • TRUE
  • FALSE
  • NOT GIVEN
questions.text: 1. IELTS Online Tests is the number one IELTS study platform.

questions.html:
2. The platform offers instant results after each reading test.

  • TRUE
  • FALSE
  • NOT GIVEN
questions.text: 2. The platform offers instant results after each reading test.
